tasks.description: A list of task specifications to be executed by this job. For single-task jobs, use the top-level task fields instead.

job_clusters.description: A list of job cluster specifications that can be shared and reused by tasks in this job.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum allowed duration for the job. If exceeded, the job is set to a TIMED_OUT life cycle state. 0 means no timeout.

continuous.description: Continuous job settings for streaming workloads.

trigger.description: Trigger settings for file arrival-based jobs.

max_concurrent_runs.description: Maximum number of concurrent runs for the job. Setting to 1 ensures only one run at a time.

run_as.description: Identity to run the job as.
